product_overview: AgenX is an AI-driven operating system for salons and barbershops providing scheduling, finance, queue management, CRM, and AI-powered marketing in a premium-themed PWA. It combines Supabase-backed multi-tenant security (RLS, audit logs) with public booking and real-time queue features.
core_goals: Enable secure multi-tenant appointment and business management with RLS and auditability
Provide best-in-class scheduling, queueing and financial workflows for owners and staff
Deliver AI-assisted marketing and insights to reduce churn and recover revenue
Offer a premium visual experience (Brutal / Beauty themes) and fast mobile UX

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Owner creates a new salon/barbershop account using business and credential fields and receives email confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/register -> Fill business name input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Fill confirm password input -> Click Register button -> See success message with email confirmation prompt

Navigate to /#/register -> Fill business name input -> Fill email input that is already registered -> Fill password input -> Fill confirm password input -> Click Register button -> See inline error for already registered email

Navigate to /#/register -> Fill business name input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Fill mismatched confirm password input -> Click Register button -> See validation error for mismatched passwords

features.name: User Login
features.description: Owner or staff sign in with email and password, with recovery link available on failure.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Login button -> See dashboard at /#/ if credentials valid
Navigate to /#/login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Login button -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /#/login -> Click Forgot password link -> Navigate to /#/forgot-password

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Request and complete password reset via email link, then set a new password and return to login.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/forgot-password -> Fill email input on forgot-password page -> Click send reset email button -> See generic confirmation message -> Open email link and land on /#/update-password -> Fill new password -> Fill confirm new password -> Click update button -> Redirect to /#/login after success

Navigate to /#/forgot-password -> Fill email input -> Click send reset email button -> See generic confirmation message -> Open email link and land on /#/update-password -> Fill new password -> Fill mismatched confirm new password -> Click update button -> See error when passwords do not match

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: First-time business setup flow (company info, contact, theme) required before accessing protected routes.
user_flows: Authenticate and be redirected to /#/onboarding -> Fill business name on step 1 -> Fill address and contact info on step 2 -> Select theme (Brutal or Beauty) on step 3 -> Click Finish to complete onboarding -> Be redirected to /#/
Authenticate and be redirected to /#/onboarding -> Leave required business name empty on step 1 -> Click Next or Finish -> See validation error if required business name is missing
Navigate directly to /#/agenda while onboarding incomplete -> Be redirected to /#/onboarding

features.name: Dashboard KPIs
features.description: Main overview with KPI cards for revenue, average ticket, and occupancy and quick refresh/insight actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/ -> View revenue KPI card -> View average ticket KPI card -> View occupancy rate KPI card -> Click KPI card to see detailed insights
Navigate to /#/ -> Click refresh metrics button -> See dashboard KPI values update
Navigate to /#/ -> If backend returns empty dataset -> See empty-state message or zeroed KPI cards

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Create, view, edit, delete and complete appointments on a calendar with staff and service selection.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/agenda -> View calendar in week view showing appointments by staff and time -> Click time slot to create new appointment -> Select service from dropdown -> Select professional from dropdown -> Select date and time -> Save appointment -> See new appointment appear on calendar
Navigate to /#/agenda -> Click existing appointment -> Edit appointment fields -> Save appointment -> See updated appointment on calendar

Navigate to /#/agenda -> Click time slot to create new appointment -> Select service and professional -> Select date and time that overlaps existing appointment -> Click Save appointment -> See conflict error when creating overlapping appointment

features.name: Queue Management (Owner)
features.description: Manage a digital walk-in queue: add waiting clients, call next client, and mark clients as completed.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/fila -> View waiting clients list (Aguardando) -> Add client to queue with name and service -> See new client in waiting list
Navigate to /#/fila -> Select next client and Call next client -> Client moves from waiting to in-service -> Mark client as completed -> See client removed or moved to completed list
Navigate to /#/fila -> Click Add client without filling required name field -> See validation error when required fields are missing

features.name: Client CRM
features.description: View and manage client list, search/filter, and open individual client profiles showing visit history.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/clientes -> View clients list -> Search clients by name to filter the list -> Select a client -> Navigate to /#/clientes/:id -> See individual client profile with appointment history
Navigate to /#/clientes -> Click Add new client -> Fill name and contact -> Click Save -> See new client appear in list
Navigate to /#/clientes -> Click Add new client -> Leave contact empty -> Click Save -> See validation error when contact is missing

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: View cashflow charts and transaction ledger, add transactions and inspect daily/monthly views.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/financeiro -> View daily cashflow chart -> View monthly cashflow chart -> Select specific date to see that day's transactions
Navigate to /#/financeiro -> Click Add income transaction -> Fill amount and details -> Save transaction -> See transaction appear in ledger and charts update
Navigate to /#/financeiro -> Click Add income transaction -> Leave amount empty -> Click Save -> See validation error when amount field is empty

features.name: Public Booking
features.description: External clients book appointments via a public tenant-specific booking link without authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /book/:slug -> Select service from list -> Select professional -> Select available date and time slot -> Fill name and phone number -> Confirm booking -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /book/:slug -> Select service -> Select unavailable time slot -> Attempt to confirm booking -> See validation or unavailable timeslot error

features.name: Queue Join (Public)
features.description: Walk-in clients join the public digital queue via tenant-specific link and receive a status link.
user_flows: Navigate to /queue/:slug -> Fill name field -> Fill phone field -> Select service -> Click join queue button -> Receive queue status link on success
Navigate to /queue/:slug -> Leave required fields empty -> Click join queue button -> See validation error when required fields are missing
Navigate to /queue/:slug -> Attempt to join when queue is closed or full -> Click join queue button -> See error when queue is closed or full

features.name: Queue Status (Public)
features.description: Clients view real-time queue position and estimated wait time after joining the queue.
user_flows: Open queue status link and land on /queue-status/:id -> View current queue position number -> View estimated wait time -> See real-time updates when position changes -> See "Now serving" state when at the front
Open invalid or expired queue status link and land on /queue-status/:id -> See error message on invalid queue link

features.name: Reports and Insights
features.description: Business analytics area providing revenue and occupancy charts, timeframe filters and export options (owner only).
user_flows: Navigate to /#/insights -> View revenue chart -> View occupancy chart -> Change timeframe filter -> See charts update for selected period
Navigate to /#/insights -> Click Export report -> See export format options and download begins
Navigate to /#/insights -> Select timeframe with no data -> See empty state message when no data in selected period

features.name: Team and Services Management
features.description: CRUD for team members and service catalog including adding, editing and removing entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/configuracoes/equipe -> View team members list -> Click Add new team member -> Fill details -> Save -> See new team member in list
Navigate to /#/configuracoes/equipe -> Select existing team member -> Edit fields -> Save -> See team member updated
Navigate to /#/configuracoes/servicos -> Click Add new service -> Fill name, price and duration -> Save -> See new service listed
Navigate to /#/configuracoes/servicos -> Attempt to add service with missing price -> Click Save -> See validation error for required fields

features.name: Security & Audit Logs
features.description: View audit logs and configure security settings (2FA, policies); administrators can trace actions across the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/configuracoes/seguranca -> View security settings -> Enable or review 2FA options -> Save changes

Navigate to /#/configuracoes/geral or /#/configuracoes/auditoria -> Navigate to /#/configuracoes/auditoria -> View audit log entries with User ID, Action and Timestamp -> Filter logs by user or timeframe
Navigate to /#/configuracoes/auditoria -> Apply filter that yields no results -> See empty state message indicating no audit entries for selected criteria

features.name: Marketing Copilot (AI)
features.description: AI-assisted marketing tools that identify churn risk, generate reactivation copy and prepare WhatsApp deep links (owner only, evolving feature).
user_flows: Navigate to /#/marketing -> View Marketing Opportunities tab -> See list of AI-suggested reactivation contacts with revenue potential -> Click an opportunity -> Generate AI copy and WhatsApp deep link -> Preview message
Navigate to /#/marketing -> Select AI opportunity and execute send (or export) -> See confirmation that message or link was generated
Navigate to /#/marketing -> If no opportunities available -> See empty state message and recommendation to widen timeframe

features.name: Recycle Bin (Soft Delete Recovery)
features.description: Recover soft-deleted clients, appointments and transactions within a retention window (admin capability).
user_flows: Navigate to /#/configuracoes/geral or Audit/Reycle UI -> Open Recycle Bin -> View list of soft-deleted items with deleted_at timestamp -> Select item -> Click Restore -> See item reinstated in original list
Navigate to Recycle Bin -> Select item older than retention period -> Attempt to restore -> See message that item retention has expired and cannot be restored

tech_stack.other: Supabase Auth, Supabase DB (RLS), Google Gemini AI, Stripe, Recharts, Lucide React

routes.description: Login page with email and password
New account registration for salon/barbershop owners
Set new password after recovery email
Initial business setup wizard shown on first login
Main dashboard with KPI cards and quick actions
Client list with search and filters
Individual client profile with appointment history
Financial management with cashflow charts and transactions
Business insights and analytics reports (owner only)
Public client-facing booking page (no login required)
Public queue join page for walk-in clients
Real-time queue position status for clients

known_limitations.issue: App uses HashRouter so all internal routes are prefixed with /#/
known_limitations.impact: URL structure is /#/login, /#/agenda etc not standard paths

known_limitations.issue: Onboarding wizard must be completed before accessing any protected route
known_limitations.impact: Tests for protected routes require a pre-configured account with tutorialCompleted=true

known_limitations.issue: RLS enforces company_id isolation at database level
known_limitations.impact: Test data must belong to the same company as the authenticated test user

known_limitations.issue: Marketing page was simplified to single Opportunities tab
known_limitations.impact: Campaign history, photo studio, and WhatsApp campaign features are no longer available
